contents:
[package]
name = "sparklers"
version = "0.1.1"
description = "Safe, ergonomic Rust bindings to the Sparkle application update framework for macOS"
authors = ["ahonn <ahonn95@outlook.com>", "Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/sparklers"
homepage = "https://github.com/slint-ui/sparklers"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/sparklers"
readme = "README.md"
keywords = ["sparkle", "updater", "macos"]
categories = ["gui", "os::macos-apis"]
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.77.2"

[workspace]
members = ["crates/sparklers-sys", "crates/sparklers-build", "crates/sparklers-find-framework", "examples/basic"]

[workspace.package]
version = "0.1.1"
authors = ["ahonn <ahonn95@outlook.com>", "Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/sparklers"
homepage = "https://github.com/slint-ui/sparklers"

[workspace.dependencies]
objc2 = "0.6"
dispatch2 = "0.3"

[workspace.dependencies.objc2-foundation]
version = "0.3"
features = ["NSDate", "NSDictionary", "NSURL", "NSBundle", "NSError", "NSString"]

[workspace.dependencies.objc2-app-kit]
version = "0.3"
features = ["NSApplication"]

[workspace.dependencies.sparklers]
path = "."
version = "0.1.0"

[workspace.dependencies.sparklers-build]
path = "crates/sparklers-build"
version = "0.1.0"

[dependencies]
thiserror = "2"
url = "2"
log = "0.4"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies]
objc2 = "0.6"
dispatch2 = "0.3"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies.sparklers-sys]
path = "crates/sparklers-sys"
version = "0.1.0"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies.objc2-foundation]
version = "0.3"
features = ["NSDate", "NSDictionary", "NSURL", "NSBundle", "NSError", "NSString"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies.objc2-app-kit]
version = "0.3"
features = ["NSApplication"]

[profile.dev]
rpath = true

[profile.release]
rpath = true

[package]
name = "sparklers-find-framework"
version = "0.1.1"
description = "Build script helpers for `sparklers`"
authors = ["ahonn <ahonn95@outlook.com>", "Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/sparklers"
homepage = "https://github.com/slint-ui/sparklers"
edition = "2024"

[package]
name = "sparklers-sys"
version = "0.1.1"
description = "Low-level bindings to the Sparkle application update framework for macOS"
authors = ["ahonn <ahonn95@outlook.com>", "Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/sparklers"
homepage = "https://github.com/slint-ui/sparklers"
edition = "2024"
links = "Sparkle.framework"

[build-dependencies.sparklers-find-framework]
path = "../sparklers-find-framework"
version = "0.1"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies]
objc2 = "0.6"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies.objc2-foundation]
version = "0.3"
features = ["NSDate", "NSDictionary", "NSURL", "NSBundle", "NSError", "NSString"]
